title: Magnum Group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Magnum.jpg|thumb|right|250px|One of Magnum group Container Transports]]
{{Quote|Magnum One reporting in. We're all stocked up and ready to go!|Magnum One captain to [[Sabra]] crew|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Magnum''' was a trio of [[Container transport|Container Transports]] in the service of the [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]] and the [[Azzameen family]]. It served with them during several vital cargo runs during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Viraxo Industries]] attacked the Azzameen family assets, Magnum group managed to evacuate the [[Twin Suns Station (space station)|Twin Suns]] Service Platform before the enemy seized the facility.

Some time later, when [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]] attacked a Viraxo [[XQ3 Platform]] [[1]], Magnum Group came in and stole all of the warheads within the site. A [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] task force tried to stop them, but Ace Azzameen fought them off with the [[Sabra]]. Magnum Group escaped with their supplies and delivered the cargo to three Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] [[Ithor (corvette group)|Ithor]]. Magnum Group then returned to the rest of the Azzameen family's forces.
